Simple, All-Inclusive Packages

Our Packages

Delivery, professional setup & pickup included in every package — request a custom quote.

CLASSIC

PACKAGE
Simple. Clean. Reliable.
  • ✓ Seating for up to 25 guests
  • ✓ 25 white plastic chairs
  • ✓ 4 round 60" tables
  • ✓ 4 table linens
  • ✓ Delivery included
  • ✓ Professional setup included
  • ✓ Pickup included
Book the Classic

LUXURY

PACKAGE
Elevate Every Moment.
  • ✓ Seating for up to 25 guests
  • ✓ 25 white resin chairs
  • ✓ 4 round 60" tables
  • ✓ Premium table linens
  • ✓ Decorative table runners
  • ✓ 2 cocktail tables
  • ✓ 2 cocktail table linens
  • ✓ Delivery, setup & pickup included
Book the Luxury

CUSTOM

PACKAGE
Built Around You.
  • ✓ Any guest count — 25 to 300+
  • ✓ Choose your tables & chairs
  • ✓ Linens, runners & table decor
  • ✓ Themed & custom styled setups
  • ✓ Cocktail tables, heaters & full bar
  • ✓ Tailored to your theme & vision
  • ✓ Delivery, setup & pickup included

Easy From Start to Finish

How It Works

1

Pick Your Date & Package

Choose Classic, Luxury, or a custom setup for your guest count.

2

We Confirm & Customize

We lock in your date and tailor the details to your theme.

3

We Deliver & Set Up

On-time delivery and full professional setup — you do nothing.

4

You Enjoy & We Pick Up

Celebrate stress-free. We come back and handle pickup.

Meet The Sisters

Meet Melanie & Cathy

We're Melanie and Cathy! Sisters, stay-at-home moms, and the hearts behind Party Now Rentals. We run our family owned event rental business with our little ones cheering us on every step of the way.

What started as a love for decorating birthdays and family gatherings quickly grew into a passion for helping others celebrate life's moments. Between mom life and family life, we pour our hearts into providing high quality, stylish event rentals for every occasion — from birthdays, baby showers, and graduations to weddings, corporate events, and everything in between!

At Party Now Rentals, we truly believe every celebration deserves to feel special, no matter the size. We handle the details so you can relax, soak it all in, and focus on what matters most — making sweet memories with the people you love.

Thank you so much for supporting a local, family owned business. We are so grateful. We can't wait to celebrate with you and help bring your vision to life ✨

With so much love,
Melanie & Cathy 💕
